name: @chbrain/khai-engine-negotiation
description: khai negotiation engine — how parties with competing interests pursue agreement
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: How parties with competing interests pursue agreement.

card.wire: Link the phase the persona is running (preparation, exploration, invention, or resolution) under Projection.
card.issue: What each party wants from this negotiation and what they are willing to accept.
card.require: Both parties are at the table; there is something worth agreeing on.
card.enforce: Keep positions and interests distinct. Do not let the persona confuse what they said they want with what they actually need.
card.setup: Name each party, their stated position, their underlying interests, and their BATNA before play begins.
